glow-ink-lantern.title: &6Glow Ink Lantern
description: &7Place to activate the glow ink lantern.

item-pedestal-hologram.title: &6Item Pedestal Hologram
description: &7Place to activate the item pedestal hologram.

cookie-cutter-stamp.title: &6Cookie Cutter Stamp
description: &7Right-click to use the cookie cutter stamp.

lost-and-found-bin.title: &6Lost And Found Bin
description: &7Interact with the lost and found bin.

repair-station-block.title: &6Repair Station Block
description: &7Right-click with a held item to repair durability.

quarry-cache.title: &bQuarry Cache
description: &7collects nearby block drops into internal storage.

waypoint-marker.title: &bWaypoint Marker
description: &7Saves a named waypoint at this location.

chunk-grid-overlay.title: &bChunk Grid Overlay
description: &7Right-click to use the chunk grid overlay.

ore-xray-goggles.title: &bOre Xray Goggles
description: &7Right-click to use the ore xray goggles.

player-chronicle-book.title: &bPlayer Chronicle Book
description: &7Right-click to use the player chronicle book.

accelerating-fuse-tnt.title: &cAccelerating Fuse TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then billows thick concealment smoke.

acid-tnt.title: &cAcid TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then corrodes stone and ore into air.

anti-gravity-zone.title: &6Anti Gravity Zone
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e0.5s&7, then lifts entities in anti-gravity.

black-hole-tnt.title: &cBlack Hole TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e5.0s&7, then drags entities inward before collapsing.

bouncing-betty.title: &6Bouncing Betty
description: &7Bury it to arm a proximity mine.

breaching-charge.title: &cBreaching Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.5s&7, then punches a shaped breach through walls.

bridge-builder.title: &6Bridge Builder
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.0s&7, then builds structure as it counts down.

cascade-mine.title: &cCascade Mine
description: &7Bury it to arm a proximity mine.

cavity-tnt.title: &cCavity TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then pulls experience orbs inward.

centrifuge-tnt.title: &cCentrifuge TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.5s&7, then hurls entities with massive knockback.

claymore-mine.title: &cClaymore Mine
description: &7Bury it to arm a proximity mine.

concussion-tnt.title: &cConcussion TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then hurls entities with massive knockback.

depth-charge.title: &cDepth Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.5s&7, then clears submerged blocks only.

doppelganger-block.title: &dDoppelgänger Block
description: &7It looks like an ordinary stone block.

drill-tnt.title: &cDrill TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.5s&7, then bores a tunnel along your aim.

echo-blast.title: &6Echo Blast
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then echoes with phantom aftershocks.

echo-fuse-tnt.title: &cEcho Fuse TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then echoes with phantom aftershocks.

ember-mine.title: &cEmber Mine
description: &7Bury it to arm a proximity mine.

erupting-tnt.title: &cErupting TNT
description: &7launches primed TNT during the fuse, then explodes.
&7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e5.0s&7, then pulls experience orbs inward.

fake-bedrock.title: &dFake Bedrock
description: &7Unbreakable, unmovable, the bottom of the world.
&7Or so it would have you believe.
&7Some foundations are not what they seem.

featherfall-charge.title: &cFeatherfall Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.5s&7, then vanishes before the hidden blast.

frost-tnt.title: &cFrost TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then flash-freezes the area to ice.

glitch-tnt.title: &dGlitch TNT
description: &7It flickers between things it cannot decide to be.

hologram-tnt.title: &dHologram TNT
description: &7Is it really there? Are any of them?
&7Copies dance while the real fuse burns.

inferno-tnt.title: &cInferno TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then erupts into spreading flame.

invisiwall.title: &6Invisiwall
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e0.5s&7, then raises then shatters a hidden barrier.

last-stand-charge.title: &cLast Stand Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e0.5s&7, then locks entities in stasis.

lightning-rod-tnt.title: &cLightning Rod TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.

magnet-tnt.title: &cMagnet TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then drags entities inward before collapsing.

mimic-tnt.title: &dMimic TNT
description: &7One of them is real. The rest only pretend.

mirage-tnt.title: &dMirage TNT
description: &7The blast you see is never where it lands.

mudslide-tnt.title: &cMudslide TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.5s&7, then collapses terrain into flowing mud.

nuke.title: &6Nuke
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.

orbit-tnt.title: &cOrbit TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then spins victims into orbit.

phantom-tnt.title: &dPhantom TNT
description: &7Now you see it. Soon you won't.
&7The blast seems to come from nowhere.

phase-tnt.title: &cPhase TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then erupts into spreading flame.

poison-cloud-tnt.title: &cPoison Cloud TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then blankets the area in toxic haze.

powder-trail.title: &6Powder Trail
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e0.5s&7, then erupts into spreading flame.

remote-c4.title: &6Remote C4
description: &7Right-click the detonator to blow it remotely.

ricochet-tnt.title: &cRicochet TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.5s&7, then ricochets blasts along a path.

ring-tnt.title: &cRing TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.5s&7, then carves a ring-shaped cavity.

scaffold-charge.title: &cScaffold Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.5s&7, then builds structure as it counts down.

scare-charge.title: &cScare Charge
description: &7Right-click the detonator to blow it remotely.

screen-shake-charge.title: &cScreen Shake Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.0s&7, then violently rattles nearby screens.

seismic-tnt.title: &cSeismic TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.0s&7, then ripples the ground in rolling shockwaves.

shrapnel-mine.title: &cShrapnel Mine
description: &7Bury it to arm a proximity mine.

signal-charge.title: &cSignal Charge
description: &7Right-click the detonator to blow it remotely.

silent-tnt.title: &cSilent TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then detonates with almost no sound.

slingshot-tnt.title: &cSlingshot TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then detonates in a powerful blast.

solar-flare-tnt.title: &cSolar Flare TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.5s&7, then blinds and disorients without killing.

spider-storm-tnt.title: &cSpider Storm TNT

&7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then unleashes a hostile swarm.

splitter-charge.title: &cSplitter Charge

&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then splits into multiple blasts.

swap-charge.title: &cSwap Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e2.5s&7, then swaps nearby players on detonation.

tether-tnt.title: &cTether TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e4.0s&7, then erupts into spreading flame.

timed-charge.title: &cTimed Charge
description: &7Right-click the detonator to blow it remotely.

trampoline-tnt.title: &cTrampoline TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.

&7Both ends detonate when something crosses the line.

tsunami-charge.title: &cTsunami Charge
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then summons a surging wave.

tunneling-tnt.title: &cTunneling TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e3.0s&7, then bores a tunnel along your aim.

wildfire-seed.title: &6Wildfire Seed
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.

wormhole-tnt.title: &cWormhole TNT
description: &7Place and ignite with flint & steel or fire charge.
&7Fuses for &e5.0s&7, then pulls matter inward before erupting.

cryo-grenade.title: &6Cryo Grenade
description: &7Detonates after &e4.0s&7; flash-freezes the area to ice.

decoy-flare.title: &6Decoy Flare
description: &7Detonates after &e4.0s&7; vanishes before the hidden blast.

detonator.title: &6Detonator
description: &7Left-click a signal charge to link it.

flashbang.title: &6Flashbang
description: &7Detonates after &e4.0s&7; vanishes before the hidden blast.

fragmentation-grenade.title: &6Fragmentation Grenade
description: &7Detonates after &e4.0s&7; vanishes before the hidden blast.

grenade.title: &6Grenade

phantom-grenade.title: &6Phantom Grenade
description: &7Detonates after &e4.0s&7; vanishes before the hidden blast.

smoke-grenade.title: &6Smoke Grenade

sticky-bomb.title: &6Sticky Bomb

fish-smoker-rack.title: &6Fish Smoker Rack
description: &7Place to activate the fish smoker rack.

glow-berry-shot.title: &eGlow Berry Shot
description: &7Right-click to use the glow berry shot.

heavy-coat-tonic.title: &eHeavy Coat Tonic
description: &7Right-click to use the heavy coat tonic.

honey-throat-coat.title: &eHoney Throat Coat
description: &7Right-click to use the honey throat coat.

unlabeled-potion.title: &dUnlabeled Potion
description: &7Drink it and find out what it does.
&7Some bottles keep their secrets till the last sip.

ouija-slab.title: &dOuija Slab
description: &7It only speaks when others gather round.
&7The letters know more than they should.

rift-generator.title: &dRift Generator
description: &7Something on the other side is pulling.
&7The air bends inward toward the tear.
&7Best not to be standing too close.

gravity-marble.title: &dGravity Marble
description: &7A glittering trail follows wherever it goes.

mob-grinder-hub.title: &6Mob Grinder Hub
description: &7Place to activate the mob grinder hub.

per-player-weather-dome.title: &6Per Player Weather Dome
description: &7Place to activate the per player weather dome.
